cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. The question is about why Ms. Leibfried asked the author to recite a passage in front of the class. The options are A through D. First, I need to recall the details from the passage. The author was an introverted, shy student who was the only nonwhite student at school. She felt like she was in a sea of tall white athletes and spent time alone reading and writing. Ms. Leibfried noticed her interest in reading and writing and made her feel less shy. She even gave her reading suggestions. The big project was a book report, but Ms. Leibfried suggested the author do something "a little different," like reciting a passage from "The Bell Jar."
